programme.desc: The medical examiner performs an autopsy when a man demands answers over the death of his brother, who died following an operation by an eminent surgeon.(n)

programme.desc: Theo accuses a district attorney of corruption for failing to convict his friend's killer. He is suspended from duty for the outburst, so sets out to get justice on his own.(n)

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The daughter of a prominent professor is terrified by a mysterious prowler who haunts the grounds of her home by night and seems able to scale sheer walls with ease. Guest starring Charles Kay, Sarah Woodward, Adrian Lukis and Alice Morphy.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur swaps the contents of his lock-up for a slot-machine full of stolen money during a trip to the fair. Unfortunately the incriminating item is passed to Morley, who uses it at a charity event, and a showdown between cops and robbers ensues. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole, Nicholas Day and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team present a line of defence against groups of mercenaries and guerrillas who are waging war on the streets of Britain. David Suchet and Geoffrey Palmer guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Two former cellmates attempt to throw a suspicious Regan off their trail by pretending that they have fallen out and that one has murdered the other. Maureen Lipman guests stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Touched by the plight of a woman suffering from a degenerative nerve disease, Quincy decides to fight the government and drug companies to ensure she gets the medication she needs.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Shelley guest stars as Evelyn McNeil, the widowed sister-in-law of Captain Frank McNeil. An aficionado of the gambling houses, she finds herself in over her head with some particularly dangerous mobsters, and banking on his lifelong friendship with Kojak, McNeil asks the detective to shield her from harm.(n)

programme.title: Championship League Snooker Live
programme.desc: Coverage of day 10 from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring matches in Winners Group A and Winners Group B. At this stage of the tournament, only the players who finished top of the original 16 groups remain. Here, they are split into four further groups of four, with two groups per day played over two tables. The new-look Championship League is taking place behind closed doors with strict rules on social distancing, Covid testing and hygiene in place, in line with government guidelines. Marshall Arena has been selected as the venue as it has an on-site accommodation meaning no players, officials or staff will need to leave the venue once they have entered. Jill Douglas presents, with analysis from Alan McManus, Stephen Hendry and Neal Foulds.(n)

programme.title: Blade: Trinity (2004)
programme.desc: The fearless warrior's blood-sucking foes frame him for murder, forcing him to go on the run from the FBI while his enemies resurrect the first and most powerful of their kind - Dracula himself. Joining forces with a team of human vampire slayers, Blade embarks on a quest to wipe out the undead menace once and for all. Fantasy action thriller sequel, with Wesley Snipes, Jessica Biel, Ryan Reynolds, Parker Posey, Kris Kristofferson and Dominic Purcell.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to investigate an incident dating back to 1953 after a death-bed confession reveals the key witness in a major corruption trial did not commit suicide as was believed, but was murdered by the police officers assigned to protect her. programme.title: The Sweeney

programme.title: Murder in the Outback: The Falconio and Lees Mystery

Director Asif Kapadia traces Amy's rise and demise over the 13 years preceding her death, telling her story via her music and autobiographical song lyrics, video footage shot by friends and family, archive television clips, plus voiceover interviews with those who were personally and professionally close to her. programme.title: Inside the Steam Train Museum
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart go to huge efforts decorating the site with home-made pumpkin-scarecrows, graveyards and mummies in preparation for Halloween. Brian cooks breakfast on a shovel for the engine drivers and John tells ghost stories from the fairground. As the event gets under way, the museum's enthusiastic volunteers dress up in costume to scare the public on the ghost train, while retired minister David entertains the passengers on the journey.(n)

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.sub-title: Paddington: A Year on the Tracks
programme.desc: The station shuts for four days over the Christmas holidays, though staff are still needed on site as they face the disruption of track and engineering works. Up the line at Oxford, workers are laying a whole new track system. Luckily, they have the Kirow Crane to help them - a multi-million-pound lifting machine that can lay over 100 tonnes of track at a time. At Swindon, specialists work to install 30 new booms to support the overhead lines for a new generation of electric trains. Weighing up to 15 tonnes, they need to be carefully lifted into place. However, bad weather threatens progress.(n)

programme.title: Dan Snow: The Tutankhamun Mystery
programme.desc: The historian explores the story of the Egyptian pharaoh's life and death. He encounters the mummies of the boy king's parents in Cairo, investigates an injury the pharaoh sustained towards the end of his life - an injury that would eventually result in his death - and explores why images of the king look more like a woman.(n)

programme.title: Ancient Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Egypt's Apocalypse - Death of a Dynasty
programme.desc: A look at what caused the downfall of the Ancient Egyptians in 30BC, with new evidence revealing a cataclysmic event that shook the world and sowed the seeds of the empire's demise. Egyptologist Joe Manning and climate historian Francis Ludlow have traced this misfortune to an event in 44BC, when a colossal volcano erupted somewhere in the Tropics.(n)

programme.title: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Documentary investigating the infamous disappearances of ships and aircraft, adopting the rather unorthodox technique of exploring the area's ominous reputation by 'draining the water from it' to see what exactly lies below the surface of the mythical triangle. Data from sophisticated sonar surveys enables the ocean floor to be seen, revealing strange geological features. The programme then contemplates whether they have had any influence on the mysterious occurrences that have been documented over the years.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Factories
programme.desc: Behind the doors of the Heinz factory in Wigan, where 850 people work around the clock to produce 200 different products, including soup, pasta and, of course, 450 millions of cans of baked beans every year. The documentary discovers the secrets of making food on this scale, meets workers including food tasters, apprentice engineers and the factory's own firemen, and also learns the story behind the famous Heinz 57 number.(n)

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell sets out on a journey to discover how six of Britain's most stunning bridges were designed and built. Completed in 1890, the Forth Rail Bridge now carries around 200 trains every day. The last of the great Victorian engineering triumphs, it has grown to symbolise Scotland as much as Edinburgh Castle, bagpipes or kilts. But, as Rob learns, this incredible engineering achievement was born from the tragedy of the 1879 Tay Bridge disaster, and 73 deaths were connected with its construction and immediate aftermath.(n)

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice tackles a three-bedroom terraced Victorian house in Norwich which, thanks to a vast array of deeply personal belongings, overpowering paintwork and too much furniture, has been languishing on the market for three months. A few coats of paint to neutralise the colour scheme, some effective storage ideas and a ruthless purge of useless items certainly impress the owner.(n)

programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories.(n)

programme.title: The Gadget Show
programme.desc: Jon Bentley takes Google's latest laptop - the Pixelbook Go - on a day's work experience at one of the world's foremost news websites, the Mail Online. The G Team assists some NHS nurses who want to see how gadgets can get them improve their sleep patterns when working night shifts. Plus, Craig Charles attempts to turn a house into a smart home using off-the-shelf DIY kits and Georgie Barrat hunts down the must-haves for 2020 at the CES exhibition in Las Vegas.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A 600-mile journey through one of the most world's most northern countries - Finland - from Helsinki in the south to Kemijärvi in Finnish Lapland. The line whisks passengers through the thickest of forests, past vast frozen lakes 63 times the size of Lake Windermere and to station stops where time has stood still. As the train enters the Arctic Circle, it calls at Rovaniemi, a place destroyed by German soldiers at the end of the Second World War. Now the town has been re-built, famously in the shape of a reindeer, serving as the official home of Santa Claus. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.title: A Greek Odyssey with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: The historian and classicist explores Greece from the time of the Ancients up to the present day. She begins by exploring a graveyard of ancient shipwrecks in the waters of the Eastern Mediterranean, then enjoys the tradition of a warm welcome on the island of Chios. Next, Bettany heads to the island of Lesbos, visiting the ancient Greek Theatre of Mytilene and taking a dip in the island's thermal waters. Finally, Bettany stops on Samos, an island known for both its ancient naval power and its famous sixth-century BC resident, mathematician and philosopher - Pythagoras.(n)

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.sub-title: When TV Stars Go Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Richard Bacon narrates a compilation of disasters befalling TV presenters, featuring mishaps involving Phillip Schofield, Anne Diamond, Denis Tuohy, Ross King, Charlotte Crosby and Stephen Bear, as well as other presenters from around the world. The show looks back at technical problems on the opening night of BBC Two and some unexpected nudity on daytime TV.(n)

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees (1944)
programme.desc: Construction workers battle against Japanese forces while working with the US navy in the South Pacific during the Second World War, while the head of the company and an officer compete for the affections of a local woman. However, when one recklessly causes a tragedy, he seeks redemption by launching an attack on a tank battalion. Drama, starring John Wayne, Susan Hayward and Dennis O'Keefe.(n)

programme.title: Strategic Air Command (1955)
programme.desc: A pilot relishes the opportunity to return to the baseball pitch once the Second World War is over. However, his sporting career is put on hold when he's drafted back into the US Air Force and given the opportunity to fly a revolutionary new jet. Drama, starring James Stewart, Frank Lovejoy, Barry Sullivan, Alex Nicol and June Allyson.(n)

programme.title: Shane (1953)
programme.desc: A mysterious gunfighter intervenes when a man and his family are threatened by a predatory cattle baron determined to force every homesteader in the valley off the land. The situation rapidly escalates into violence, while an unspoken attraction develops between the gunman and the settler's wife. Western, starring Alan Ladd, Jack Palance, Van Heflin and Jean Arthur. Based on the novel by Jack Schaefer.(n)

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley.(n)

programme.title: The Square (2017)
programme.desc: A prestigious Stockholm museum's chief art curator finds himself in times of both professional and personal crisis as he attempts to set up a controversial new exhibit, known as The Square. Comedy drama, starring Claes Bang, Elisabeth Moss and Dominic West.(n)

programme.title: The Take (2016)
programme.desc: An American pickpocket in Paris accidentally steals some top secret information, and finds himself on the run from the CIA. The agent in charge of the investigation recruits the thief's help when he discovers a sinister conspiracy that threatens both of them. Action thriller, starring Idris Elba and Richard Madden.(n)

programme.title: Filmworker (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about Leon Vitali, the English actor who took an extended break from his successful career to work for Stanley Kubrick as his assistant and casting director. His first task was to scour America for a boy to play Danny in The Shining - a part for which Vitali claims he auditioned four thousand children.(n)

programme.title: Donovan's Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medic's snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero.(n)

programme.title: El Dorado (1966)
programme.desc: An ageing gunfighter is drawn into the conflict between a land-grabbing cattle baron and a ranching family, but gets wounded in the process. A year later, he returns to town to find the situation has not improved - so along with his sidekick and the drunken town sheriff, he fights to defend the family from its enemies. Western, starring John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, James Caan and Ed Asner.(n)

programme.title: The Charge of the Light Brigade (1968)
programme.desc: Historical drama set during the Crimean War, in which British military commanders order a disastrous attack on Russian gun positions, causing the needless slaughter of hundreds of cavalrymen. Starring David Hemmings, Vanessa Redgrave, John Gielgud, Trevor Howard and Harry Andrews.(n)

programme.title: X-Men 2 (2003)
programme.desc: Mutant heroes the X-Men are forced into an uneasy alliance with arch-enemy Magneto to battle a common foe. Following an attempt on the US president's life, a sinister military scientist launches a raid on Professor Xavier's school and hatches a plan to rid the world of all mutants. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen, Alan Cumming, Halle Berry and Brian Cox.(n)

programme.title: Lucy (2014)
programme.desc: A courier is kidnapped and forced to become a drug mule. When she is exposed to the experimental chemicals she is smuggling, it boosts her intelligence and reflexes to superhuman levels. She uses her newfound abilities to get revenge on her captors, but as the process continues, she evolves into something more than human. Sci-fi thriller, starring Scarlett Johansson and Morgan Freeman.(n)

programme.title: Reservoir Dogs (1992)
programme.desc: Criminals are employed by a crime boss to carry out a diamond robbery that goes disastrously wrong. In the bloody aftermath of the heist, they try to establish what happened and how the police were aware of their plans all along - leading to the hardening suspicion that one of them betrayed the gang. Quentin Tarantino's thriller, starring Harvey Keitel, Tim Roth, Michael Madsen, Chris Penn and Steve Buscemi.(n)

programme.title: The Killing (1956)
programme.desc: An ex-convict assembles a motley crew of crooks and no-hopers to pull off an elaborate robbery at a heavily guarded racetrack. Stanley Kubrick's noir thriller, starring Sterling Hayden, Coleen Gray, Vince Edwards, Jay C Flippen and Timothy Carey.(n)

programme.title: Night Comes On (2019)
programme.desc: Angel Lamere is released from juvenile detention on the eve of her 18th birthday. Haunted by her past, she embarks on a journey with her 10-year-old sister that could destroy their future. Drama, starring Dominique Fishback, Tatum Marilyn Hall and Nastashia Fuller.(n)

programme.title: The Naked Jungle (1954)
programme.desc: A tough South American cocoa plantation owner and his newly arrived mail-order bride are menaced by a huge column of ferocious killer ants destroying everything in their path. Thriller, starring Charlton Heston, Eleanor Parker and William Conrad.(n)

programme.title: Warlock (1959)
programme.desc: A ruthless vigilante is recruited as a sheriff to clean up the streets of a crime-ridden town, but his strong-arm tactics soon antagonise the townsfolk. When a woman turns up and accuses the lawman of murdering her fiance, the residents rally to her cause with the help of a rival gunslinger. Western, starring Henry Fonda, Richard Widmark, Anthony Quinn, DeForest Kelley and Dorothy Malone.(n)

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger.(n)

programme.title: Hampstead (2017)
programme.desc: An American widow finds unexpected love with a man living wild on Hampstead Heath when they take on the developers who want to destroy his home. Romantic comedy drama, starring Brendan Gleeson, Diane Keaton and James Norton.(n)

programme.title: The Boss (2016)
programme.desc: A successful entrepreneur is imprisoned for insider trading, losing everything in the process. After her sentence, she sets out to launch a comeback and win back the respect of the nation - but with no one else to turn to, she finds herself a reluctant houseguest of her long-suffering former assistant. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Bell and Peter Dinklage.(n)

programme.title: No Escape (2015)
programme.desc: An American takes a job in an Asian nation and relocates his family overseas. However, no sooner do they arrive then a revolution takes the country by storm. They face a struggle for survival as the new government seeks to eliminate all foreigners. Action thriller, starring Owen Wilson, Pierce Brosnan and Lake Bell.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey are pleased to discover that Brenda is pregnant, but Jeff's hopes of avoiding the surrogate's mood swings are soon dashed. Meanwhile, Jen starts to plan her and Adam's wedding and finds his suggestions unhelpful - but then Timmy steps in to organise the event.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey discovers a picture of Jeff at an art gallery and this inspires him to get fit again, while Adam is also taken with the photo and decides to have a professional shoot with Jen. Elsewhere, Audrey encourages Liz to have a good time dating instead of becoming obsessed with finding a potential husband.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina begins a career in journalism with her first paying job at Scorch, an alternative music magazine that focuses on everything and anything cutting-edge.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina's first assignment at Scorch is to interview a rock star, but when the truth about the arrogant superstar is published, he threatens to sue the magazine.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe loses his swagger in the bedroom when he learns the significance of the little devil tattoo that was inked on Mel's bottom years before. Lennox and Zander are forced to work with an untrained actress when they make their short film, but their efforts to tutor her in the role cause conflict between them.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe gets a new job as the lifestyle correspondent on a local morning TV show, but is required to get up very early every day, which puts a strain on his relationship with Mel. Lennox and Zander have creative differences as they continue to shoot their short film. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie sells the table football game to a student fraternity as part of her plan to 'baby proof' the apartment, unaware that Ben was using it as a hiding place for Emma's college tuition money. Meanwhile, Riley is not happy that Danny is going out with the sister of her ex-boyfriend. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley decides to travel by train to her family reunion in Florida, so Ben volunteers to tag along, seeing it as the perfect opportunity for them to rekindle their romance. When Tucker gets the chance to co-host a television show, he asks Bonnie for help with his audition tape. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.desc: Penny makes an important decision after Leonard tries to help her in the aftermath of a failed role on a TV show. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When bad weather closes the school, Murray makes Adam and Barry shovel snow off the path, but the boys take advantage of their dad when they discover that he has a fear of snow. However, when Chad picks Dave Kim as his doubles partner, Adam vows to team up with Barry to beat them in a match. Beverly helps Erica to get through her post-break-up depression in time for Valentine's Day. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. Meanwhile, Gina and Boyle become concerned about their parents' relationship, and Santiago makes Holt a Christmas gift. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy subject their friends to a series of secret tests to find out who is most qualified to act as best man and maid of honour at their wedding. Penny realises her true feelings about her friendship with Amy.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Bert the geologist replaces Howard in his band Footprints on the Moon, and Sheldon finds Penny to be a surprising source of scientific inspiration. Laurie Metcalf and Brian Posehn guest star.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe fears that being a nanny will prevent him from having a love life, so a worried Mel lies to get him a date with her former sorority sister. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel disapproves of a boy Lennox has started dating, despite seeing 'a bad boy' herself. Meanwhile, Joe takes it upon himself to tidy his employer's closet. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake badly injures himself while chasing down a suspect, but then refuses to take time off from work to recover. Holt and Rosa have an awkward dinner date with their significant others, so they invite Amy and Gina along as well. Andy Samberg stars.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is excited to work a case with the best detective in the NYPD, Dave Majors - until his colleague shares his intentions to ask Amy out on a date. Rosa's surprising fashion choice causes a stir, and Charles and Gina make an unexpected discovery. Comedy, with Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.desc: Sheldon goes to Las Vegas and does everything he can to win a large sum of money for science. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette take Amy shopping for a wedding dress, but her terrible choice entangles them in a web of lies.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns that his mother won't attend his wedding unless he invites his brother Georgie, he and Leonard travel to Texas to end a family feud. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette's children inadvertently give them, Amy and Raj conjunctivitis. Jerry O'Connell guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at events surrounding the deadly minibus crash. Ste makes a shocking discovery. Esther faces the threat of Maddie's wrath.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's dreams come true when he gets the chance to spend the day with his hero, veteran crime reporter Jimmy Brogan, but their encounter has unexpected consequences. programme.title: Gogglesprogs

programme.desc: When Morty complains that Rick's adventures are too frightening and traumatic, Rick allows him to lead their next expedition. Rick also provides the family with an inventive solution when they come to him with their trivial problems.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina's attempt to impress her colleagues backfires when she accidentally blurts out too much information about her magical antics.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina is scared about interviewing a singer with a nasty reputation, but her spell to make the superstar more harmonious backfires and the girls end up swapping personalities.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel persuades her father Russell to give Joe's mother Gloria advice about drawing up a will, but is alarmed when the pair start to get along a little too well. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander try to work out whether they should be 'friends with benefits'. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe are given a taste of the future when they are frozen during a freak avalanche, and thawed out 100 years later, only to discover the world has changed dramatically during the course of the last century. Comedy, directed by and starring Joey Lawrence, with Melissa Joan Hart.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley decides she would prefer to keep it a secret when she and Ben start dating again. Meanwhile, the family members return to their old neighbourhood to take part in a local party, and Danny considers moving to Paris when Georgie gets a new job there. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is jealous of Barry's outstanding performance when they both get after-school jobs at Spencer's Gifts selling novelty presents at the shopping mall. Murray insists that Adam must get a job too, but Beverly thinks he should focus on his filmmaking instead.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tries to develop an acting career, a talent agent decides he's only suitable for 'nerd' roles, so Beverly makes it her mission to turn him into a teen heartthrob. Barry decides to embrace the punk rock lifestyle, and Murray attempts to get more involved in Erica's life.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj finds himself in the middle of a domestic drama when he realises that the woman he's dating, Nell, has a husband, Oliver, who is very upset about their new relationship. Sheldon rents his old room back to have a quiet place to work and drives Leonard crazy by being a model tenant.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon petitions Wil Wheaton to allow him to appear on the new Professor Proton show, so the actor offers a guest appearance to Amy instead. Meanwhile, Penny gets angry when she thinks the female protagonist in Leonard's novel is based on her.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel opts to ground Lennox when she discovers she is failing chemistry and tells her to study. However, Mel's father, Senator Russell Burke, shows up and unexpectedly undermines her authority. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel sees Joe having a secret meeting with a girl named Tessa in the basement, and discovers they are on the search for her brother-in-law. Meanwhile, Mel and the nanny begin to suspect Ryder is being bullied at school when he keeps losing his belongings, but only make things worse by trying to get his stuff back. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben panics when he realises he has forgotten his mother's birthday yet again, so he enlists an unwilling Danny, Tucker and Riley to organise a celebration in a hurry. programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago go undercover as an engaged couple in a bid to catch an identity thief, and find that the investigation brings them closer together. Meanwhile, Boyle organises a surprise birthday party for Rosa. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray help Erica move into her college dormitory, while Adam tries to find the perfect girlfriend for Barry.(n)

programme.desc: Adam has to tackle a school project on the Second World War, so decides to make a film featuring his grandfather. However, Pops takes matters into his own hands when Adam finds all his war stories mundane. Erica fails to cope with her own cooking and laundry at college and returns home to confront Beverly for over-mothering her, but Murray insists that Beverly starts to teach Erica and Barry basic life skills.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's honeymoon runs aground in New York, Penny and Leonard discover that they are uncomfortably similar to Amy's parents, while Raj insults astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and starts a war on social media. Kathy Bates and Teller (of Penn and Teller fame) guest star as Amy's parents.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy drive themselves to distraction trying to figure out what the 'perfect gift' is that Leonard and Penny have got them for their wedding. Meanwhile, Raj decides he wants to settle down and asks his father to arrange a marriage for him.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at events surrounding the deadly minibus crash. On the day of the joint wedding, a catastrophic accident threatens to destroy lives in the village.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette's friends each try different tactics to help her go into labour. Howard isn't happy when he finds out that Bernadette has already chosen their son's name ithout his input.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy, Howard and Bernadette have a difficult time deciding which one of them should stay at home with the kids and who should return to work.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel invites a TV reporter to do a story on her and the family to help improve her public image. However, when the journalist discovers she has a male nanny working for her, she decides to change the focus of the piece. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications.(n)

Convinced he is somehow causing the strange events, Buffy searches for a way to wake him up.(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads to Thailand to find out about the surprising that makes a prawn cracker unique, while Matt Tebbutt visits Britain's largest producer of fresh herbs to learn about a new hi-tech method of extending shelf-life. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting a Norman castle, restoring a Fiat 500 and making a table from part of Southend pier.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Documentary following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree through the process of buying and restoring a French chateau that has been empty for the past four decades. Their new home has 12 acres of land, nine outbuildings, a walled garden and a moat - but it also has no electricity, heating or water, and proves to be a far more complicated DIY project than expected.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets a Leicestershire couple who plan to build a country cottage, but the land they plan to build on ends up costing most of their budget before work can even begin.(n)

They hope the group will send out energy for world peace and healing, but Mike and Denise question whether the whole thing is a joke.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches B&B in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. Fellow competitor Katherine puts the owners through their paces at breakfast when she asks for something off the menu, and the hosts are pleasantly surprised at feedback time.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. The Oak owner Natalie wants to know why some of her guests were not enthused by her extractor fans, but she herself receives aggression from Dennis over her criticism of the White Lady. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Prince Philip: The Plot to Make a King
programme.desc: Secret History documentary telling the inside story of the dynastic tensions that were unleashed when Princess Elizabeth, the future queen, fell in love with Prince Philip. It was felt that Philip was rough and ill-mannered - and with the Second World War still fresh in most people's minds, the royal and political elite disliked his German roots. But following the death of King George VI in 1952, the establishment feared a dynastic coup, with the Queen torn between the two sides. The documentary examines the complexities and frustrations of the royal marriage, as the monarch struggled to reconcile the love of her husband with the suspicions of her family and her government.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Headteacher Emma arrives in resus having been in a collision with a bus while cycling home from the school she works at. As she is treated, her husband Mick reflects on being informed what had happened. Meanwhile, 33-year-old Josh is treated for severe back pain, and 87-year-old Pamela is examined for a possible blood clot in her leg, and tells the doctors about her childhood in London during the Blitz.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The series reaches its majestic climax. Who will win Greg Davies's coveted golden head to become just the seventh Taskmaster Champion in history?(n)

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: The comedian tests his preconceptions of Albania, guided on a whistlestop tour of the country by local TV presenter and journalist Erjona Rusi. Along the way, he tries to discover why Albania has remained a stubbornly unfashionable holiday destination, meeting those at the extremes of the country, from the rural farmers to the billionaire playboys who live in the cities in the company of supermodels.(n)

programme.title: Waterloo Dead
programme.desc: Two hundred years after the Battle of Waterloo, investigators Tim Sutherland, Malin Holst and Simon Richardson employ forensic techniques to uncover surprising secrets from one of the greatest military encounters of all time.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The creation of a set of Second World War sea defences built near the mouth of the River Thames to protect London. Plus, a concrete pyramid build during the Cold War.(n)

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.sub-title: John Christie: Serial Killer - Part One
programme.desc: The first of two programmes looking at the case of John Christie, who murdered at least eight women, including his own wife.(n)

programme.title: True Evil: The Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: A look at Wernher von Braun, the gifted young scientist whose ambition led him to abandon any sense of morality in pursuit of his dream of space flight.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a Christmas special from Lyme Park in Cheshire, where she and toy expert Will Farmer look back at children's Christmas presents dating back to Edwardian times. In the house's gardens, over 2000 visitors have arrived to have their items valued, including many with a royal heritage. The programme features a cup and saucer once owned by the Queen, a pram from Buckingham Palace, and a dagger believed to have been owned by Charles I. Plus, a celebration of the works of Charles Dickens.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three MGs from the 70s turn up at the garage, still covered in original factory wax. Nobody can believe it, or value them. A Morris 1000 turns up at the auction along with a TR7 V8.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Stoke-on-Trent to Winsford, Cheshire, finding out about one of the greatest locomotive factories in railway history along the way. He also discovers the dark side of the Industrial Revolution and learns how Victorian potteries brought their products to the masses.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Dudley in the West Midlands to Bridgnorth, Shropshire. He learns how Victorian blacksmithing was not for the faint-hearted, rides on one of Britain's most modern trains and traverses the Victoria Bridge at Bewdley in Worcestershire.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Bowood House in Wiltshire. Among the items being brought in for valuation are a collection of glass ornaments, an 18th-century portrait that children have used for target practice, a carved walking stick, a book documenting the travels of a 19th-century explorer and an account of the sinking of the Titanic by an officer who survived.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: An insight into woodlands around the world, from the stunted conifers cloaked in snow and ice in the Arctic forests, to the broadleaf woods in North America and Europe. Also featured are the 100m-high giant redwoods of California, as well as Madagascar's unusual upside-down trees, which store water in their swollen trunks and harbour strange wildlife. Presented by David Attenborough.(n)

programme.desc: Three rare Alvises get the auction buyers going when put under the hammer. A Chevy Corvette which started its journey in Saudi Arabia makes its way to Thornton le Dale for the sale.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Victory: The Post-War Plan
programme.desc: Hitler's plans to invade the US using battleships, long-range bombers and secret infiltrators. Plus, a look at support for the Nazi movement in America during the 1940s.(n)

programme.title: True Evil: The Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: Heinrich Himmler, the book-loving loner whose strange mystical beliefs drove him to carry out the most shocking act of genocide in human history.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Welshpool, Powys, to Aberystwyth in Ceredigion. He experiences Victorian entertainment in one of Wales's best-loved resorts, hears how the railways took the country's textiles into the most exclusive households and unleashes the power of a 19th-century engineering triumph.(n)

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the next stage of his journey in which he travels from the naval hub of Portsmouth to Grimsby docks. On the first leg, he helps feed the crew of Britain's newest battleship, discovers how the Victorians planned to repel a possible French invasion and learns there is a well-established industry in an unlikely location.(n)

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a deep-sea diver explore Chuuk Lagoon, one of the world's greatest underwater graveyards, for a wreck discovered by sonar nearly 20 years ago.(n)

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie faces his worst nightmare when Marlene's sister decides to pay a visit from Peckham. As if the man-eating glamourpuss was not enough to cope with, he finds all his staff tied up in the barn - and realises his past has come back to haunt him. Guest starring Paula Wilcox.(n)

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: A visit to a local country mansion reveals Boycie's admiration for the long-established tradition of respect for the gentry. programme.title: First Dates Hotel

However, things do not get off to a great start for cat lover Zoe and her date Joseph, who makes a nervous first impression. Will a bit of witty repartee and the revelation about his own furry friend encourage her to let her guard down? Meanwhile, James has extended his stay in the hope of meeting his soulmate - and it seems that 6ft 6 Max from Oxford might just be the man for him.(n)

programme.title: Women Who Kill
programme.desc: With more than 30,000 women in prisons in America serving lengthy sentences for murder, this documentary looks at some of the extraordinary stories of women who committed these crimes, and the reasons why they killed people they knew and loved. They include Amber Hilberling, who was 19 and pregnant when she pushed her husband out of a window, Patricia Ignacio, who admitted to bludgeoning her cousin to death with a rock, and Ana Trujillo, who murdered her boyfriend by stabbing him with a stiletto shoe.(n)

programme.title: Murder in the Outback: The Falconio and Lees Mystery
programme.desc: Documentary examining the killing of British tourist Peter Falconio in Australia's Northern Territory in July 2001, exploring the details and questions that surround this infamous case. The concluding episode examines how DNA found on Joanne Lees' shirt and the couple's Kombi van were decisive in the murder trial of Bradley Murdoch, but even with this evidence, there are serious questions still to be answered in this controversial case.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Deal or No Deal
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Deal or No Deal: Jonathan Ross
programme.desc: Chat-show host Jonathan Ross takes part in the game show, as he battles with the Banker and tries to guess the value of mystery boxes to win up to £250,000 for his chosen charity. Noel Edmonds oversees proceedings.(n)

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: As another season of love draws to a close, Fred Sirieix and his fellow cupids pull out all the stops in the hope of ending on a high. However, things do not get off to a great start for cat lover Zoe and her date Joseph, who makes a nervous first impression. Will a bit of witty repartee and the revelation about his own furry friend encourage her to let her guard down? Meanwhile, James has extended his stay in the hope of meeting his soulmate - and it seems that 6ft 6 Max from Oxford might just be the man for him.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The wedding season draws to close, but Dick and Angel need to look ahead to the winter. Dick ploughs up the wild flower meadow, a change that Angel does not entirely approve of, and the couple transforms the dilapidated coach house into a cafe, complete with a striking neon sign.(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The future of a French restaurant hangs in the balance, and scorching temperatures cause problems at a glamping site. In Spain, a couple from Halifax open a B&B with a cave, and a crazy golf course is ready to tee off.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Lincoln Holiday Retreat, where guests Luke and John's great first impressions are muddied due to cleanliness concerns.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Marine biologist Alison is busy preparing for the release of Nick, a critically endangered African penguin, on the Western Cape. Vet Emily has to anaesthetise a cheetah that needs to go to a new home.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps a Middlesex midwife and her father to find a holiday home in Menorca with a pool and space to set up a beauty salon, on a budget of £325,000.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend restore a 1972 Toyota Celica, one of the first Japanese sports coupes to find success on the global market, but spares are almost impossible to find.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to The Chapel in Harrogate, North Yorkshire, whose owners Mark Hinchliffe and Heidi Donohoe, pride themselves on offering something a little different in their converted chapel. On arrival, the guests are wowed by the interior and artwork on show. However, Luke and John discover some grime underneath the glamour and Debbie is concerned about her traditional Chinese bed. At dinner, all the guests congratulate Mark and Heidi on their pretty property, but things soon turn ugly when talk turns to the looming payment day as it becomes clear that the B&B'ers have grievances to air.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Telecoms manager Susan hosts the penultimate evening in and around Reading, serving up a spicy menu that she hopes will go down well with her fellow diners.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Young Brighton couple Hannah and Luke kick off the competition with an ambitiously trendy menu, then more experienced hosts Karen and Mark step up to the plate the next day, followed by Rachel and TJ, who have given nothing away to their fellow hosts.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert asks Ray and Debra to help with his criminal psychology course by taking IQ tests - but gives them misleading results to gauge their reactions.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra becomes jealous of a waitress who catches Ray's eye. Although the situation is perfectly innocent, the couple soon blow everything out of all proportion.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Maris murder case makes Niles a celebrity, but it's not long before a jealous Frasier seizes the chance to regain his place in the spotlight. Meanwhile, Roz's arrogant sister Denise gets her comeuppance. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: KACL staff compete against a rival station in a weight-loss challenge. Frasier refuses to participate, but Roz offers herself as part of the prize. Meanwhile, Niles struggles to cope with the sleepless nights caused by an unusual symptom of Daphne's pregnancy.(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A crazy-golf course in Spain does a roaring trade, and a couple from Halifax plan a big event at their B&B. In France, an Anglo-French restaurant opens its doors for the first time, and a couple from Southend try paragliding.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Debbie at Riverside Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre calls on fellow Brit Emma to take in two baby jackals that have been found abandoned, while Emily and Will relocate two cheetahs.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couple's two children are struggling to save the business from their parents' disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting in North London and Hertfordshire. In London, Kirstie helps first time buyers Emily and Dustin who are desperate get on the property ladder after spending a year living with Emily's parents as they save up for a deposit. Meanwhile in Hertfordshire, Phil tries to find home for three generations of females moving out of London.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits Bayou on the Vine, a family-run Cajun restaurant in the redeveloped Jazz District of Kansas City, Missouri that is struggling with an uncertain future. He and his team have just 24 hours to re-imagine the premises with a jazz theme, giving it a more authentic colour scheme, and original decor that includes musical instruments and family photographs.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: From entertainment juggernauts to the week's biggest news stories and from hard-hitting documentary series to gritty drama, a cast of well-known faces offers sharp, insightful, funny and sometimes emotional critiques of popular and topical TV shows, sparking debate and giving viewers the chance to share those 'we said that' moments. This episode features Denise Van Outen and her partner Eddie, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Joe Swash and Stacey Solomon, Zoe Ball and her son Woody Cook, Nicola Adams and her partner Ella, and Harry Redknapp and his wife Sandra.(n)

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: A look back at some of the series' most memorable and dynamic dates - reliving the moments of nerves, awkwardness, naughtiness and passion, and of unlikely chemistry, roaring rivalries and heart-warming stories. The show also reveals what the daters are up to now - featuring chicken farmer Griff, Perry in his gold lamé trunks, and Robyn, whose love mantra is 'treat 'em mean and keep 'em keen'. London ladette Lauren is about to have the shock of her life, while double-daters, best friends and fashionistas Sara and Jo head off in search of something a bit more meaningful.(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the popular words-and-numbers quiz, as Sean Lock and Claudia Winkleman take on Jon Richardson and Henning Wehn. Lexicographer Susie Dent is joined by Nick Helm to adjudicate in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters.(n)

programme.title: Women Who Kill
programme.desc: With more than 30,000 women in prisons in America serving lengthy sentences for murder, this documentary looks at some of the extraordinary stories of women who committed these crimes, and the reasons why they killed people they knew and loved. They include Amber Hilberling, who was 19 and pregnant when she pushed her husband out of a window, Patricia Ignacio, who admitted to bludgeoning her cousin to death with a rock, and Ana Trujillo, who murdered her boyfriend by stabbing him with a stiletto shoe.(n)

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Liam Charles and Tom Allen set two chocolate-themed challenges for the four remaining teams in the third episode - and one of the tasks they will face has never been seen before in the show. For the climactic showpiece round, the teams are required to make a firework-themed creation, which must incorporate moving parts as well as featuring chocolate entremets. Judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finde will assess their efforts before deciding which three teams will be continuing to next week's round.(n)

programme.desc: Keen to impress with their cooking in Brighton is long-married couple David and Liz, newlyweds James and Paul, and loved-up Martin and Lorena. Day two sees creative Paul and his husband James pull out all the stops to create a very personal evening. programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank has some anecdotes published in a magazine, sowing the seeds of grand writing ambitions. He approaches Ray's editor about becoming a columnist, but finds his way with words leaves a lot to be desired. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle.(n)

programme.desc: Marie decides 40 years of marriage to Frank is enough for any woman and moves in with Ray - to the delight of Robert, who enjoys being mothered by her. programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: As the summer ends, we catch up with the Brits running businesses in Europe. In Spain, storms flood a B&B. A couple from Southend are overwhelmed with glampers, and it's panic stations at a restaurant in France when the mayor arrives and the cooker is on the blink.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics

programme.title: Murder in the Outback: The Falconio and Lees Mystery
programme.desc: Documentary examining the killing of British tourist Peter Falconio in Australia's Northern Territory in July 2001, exploring the details and questions that surround this infamous case. In this first episode, Andrew Fraser, formerly one of Australia's foremost criminal defence lawyers, begins the reinvestigation into the Peter Falconio story, visits the Outback crime scene and speaks to a leading forensic scientist and witnesses from the time of the murder, who raise serious questions about evidence in the case.(n)

programme.title: Murder in the Outback: The Falconio and Lees Mystery
programme.desc: A look at how sole eyewitness Joanne Lees came under immense scrutiny and pressure from both the British and Australian press as they hounded her continuously for an interview, while certain detectives were also sceptical of her version of events. The programme includes detailed sections of a video showing Joanne being confronted by detectives about seeming inconsistences in her account of the attack.(n)

programme.title: Murder in the Outback: The Falconio and Lees Mystery
programme.desc: In the third episode, former criminal defence lawyer Andrew Fraser questions the verdict of the murder trial, that saw Bradley Murdoch found guilty of murder. The programme examines other potential suspects, including an eyewitness account of a couple talking to a man who matched the police description of the killer, as well as considering theories that Falconio is still alive, since his body was never found and several people have reported encountering him.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)
